hero.title: Discover Your
hero.subtitle: Unveil the mysteries of Vedic astrology with AI. Get personalized horoscopes, birth charts, and transit predictions using traditional Nepali planetary wisdom.

features.subtitle: Experience the perfect blend of traditional Vedic astrology and cutting-edge AI technology.

kundali.title: Birth Chart
kundali.desc: Get your complete birth chart analysis with detailed planetary positions based on Vedic astrology principles.

gochar.title: Transit Analysis
gochar.desc: Track planetary transits and understand how current celestial movements influence your life journey.

horoscope.title: Daily Horoscope
horoscope.desc: Receive personalized daily predictions based on your birth chart and current planetary alignments.

ai.title: AI Astrologer
ai.desc: Ask questions in Nepali or English and get instant astrological insights powered by advanced AI.

dasha.title: Dasha Prediction
dasha.desc: Understand your planetary periods and their influence on various aspects of your life.

remedies.title: Remedies
remedies.desc: Get personalized remedies including mantras, gemstones, and rituals to balance planetary energies.

testimonials.subtitle: See what our users say about their cosmic journey.

items.content: The AI chatbot accurately predicted my career change! The birth chart analysis was very detailed and useful.
Finally, an astrology app using Nepali planet names! The transit predictions were accurate for business decisions.
The suggested remedies helped me overcome difficulties in my relationship. Highly recommend the Dasha analysis!

cta.subtitle: Join thousands of users who have discovered their cosmic path. Get your personalized Vedic astrology reading today.

footer.desc: AI-powered Vedic astrology with traditional Nepali planetary wisdom.
